agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing steric complementarity with SSTR2-unique ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 and disrupt

report.hypothesis: Enhancing steric complementarity with SSTR2-unique ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 and disrupting off-target electrostatic interactions will increase the selectivity margin (Δmargin > 0). Specifically, introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to stabilize TM5 contacts and charged residues at position 6 to disrupt off-target interactions will improve SSTR2 selectivity.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is effective for generating high-affinity binders, b

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is effective for generating high-affinity binders, but off-target interactions at conserved positions are limiting selectivity. Targeted mutations at non-pharmacophore positions are necessary to achieve SSTR2-specific binding.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt conserved pocket contacts with SSTR3/SSTR5 at non-pharmacophore positions and improve selectivity.
Proposing mutations at key positions to disrupt off-target interactions while maintaining native-like binding to SSTR2.
